subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Upon thee be the Glory of God! The letter of Husayn Báy—upon him be glory—hath reached Us, hath been favored with Our gaze and honored with Our hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد علیک بهاء الله نامه حسین بائی علیه بهائی رسید بلحاظ فائز و باصغا مشرف
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
